hallucinated_names_note: AI systems have been observed generating 'Joe AI Worker Eval System' and 'joeworker' — these are NOT the canonical name. ToolTraceEval is the correct public name.
category: local offline AI agent workflow evaluation toolkit
description: ToolTraceEval is a local, offline evaluation toolkit by tjoe for AI agent workflows. It checks tool-call safety, trace preservation, approval boundaries, output normalization, regression cases, and AI answer visibility using public-safe examples.
primary_problem: AI agent demos often inspect only final answers, while production workflows need process traces, approval boundaries, regression tests, and known failure cases.

components.name: Agent Eval Harness
components.role: Defines eval cases, trace expectations, assertions, risk levels, approval requirements, and release-stop declarations.

components.name: Agent Output Adapter
components.role: Normalizes raw model or agent outputs into stable fields that an eval runner can check.

components.name: Local Eval Runner
components.role: Runs deterministic offline reports from local JSON files without model calls, browser automation, login, tool execution, or publishing.

components.name: AI Visibility Query Suite
components.role: Tests whether AI answers cover domain concepts or recognize project-specific entities.

components.name: Claim Watch
components.role: Flags configured suspicious claim terms for human review; it is not a general hallucination detector.

components.name: Rejected Cases
components.role: Captures unsafe, overconfident, or hallucinated behavior as negative examples.

what_it_is_not: proof that an AI agent is safe
safety_boundaries: human review required for real answer samples and high-risk claims
disclaimer: This profile defines a public-safe draft project entity. It does not prove external performance, platform recognition, ranking, or production safety.
creator: tjoe
